parsed.tier_rationale: The MLX-specific papers (PMC11398402, PMC11900861, PMC11425880, PMC10970504) concern metabolism, aging and insect development in non-immune systems with no TCR content. The TCR-related papers (PMC8978620, PMC4209802, PMC8704919, PMC5587706, PMC11237943, PMC6504948) do not study MLX; the only genuine TCR-inhibition study involves PTPN22, not MLX. No retrieved primary study materially links MLX to TCR inhibition or a related inhibitory T cell phenotype.
